prompt: Create a loose, hand-drawn fashion street sketch in a naive black-ink marker style on a white background, showing exactly 2 tall slim young women standing on a rainy neon city sidewalk outside a BALENCIAGA storefront. Put the large handwritten word BALENCIAGA across the upper left. The left woman has a simple visible face, bright yellow-blonde chin-length hair with bangs, a relaxed tilted pose, very long thin legs, high-heeled open-toe sandals, and an oversized black hoodie or sweatshirt with the small white text BB BALENCIAGA on the chest above a short black skirt. The right woman is taller, with long black braided or dreadlocked hair and a deliberately blurred rectangular face, wearing an oversized black zip jacket, short black skirt, long thin legs, and high-heeled open-toe sandals, leaning casually with hands in pockets. Draw the clothes mostly as dense scribbled black fills with rough white highlights and wobbly outlines. The background should include exactly 5 visible vertical city signs on the left side: one tall white sign with yellow symbols and a red block, one narrow black sign with yellow characters, one white sign with red Japanese katakana reading カラオケ, one tiny traffic-light-like sign with red/yellow/green marks, and one small blue sign near the street; add another small blue-and-white sign on the far right edge. Show wet pavement with reflected red, yellow, blue, and gray squiggles, tiny distant pedestrians, simple perspective lines of buildings, and a minimal storefront wall on the right. Keep the composition sketchy, high-fashion, candid, imperfect, with thin black lines, sparse color accents, and lots of white space.
